div.div: Share a secure link with customer stakeholders who do not log into the portal.

div.p: Track status, share updates, and collaborate with the support team.

t.div: The ticket has been reopened and returned to the support queue.
Escalation request sent. Support team has been notified.
Your feedback has been shared with the support team.
Thank you. Your satisfaction rating has been recorded.

div.p: If the issue returns, use Reopen Ticket from this page.
Support will review your latest update and continue handling this ticket.

ul.li: Send a structured update if anything changes.
Attach logs or screenshots to speed up investigation.
Close the ticket once the issue is fully resolved.

div.span: Latest updates and files shared on this ticket

div.t-attf-class: o_helpdesk_public_message #{'is-customer' if (message.author_id and ticket.partner_id and message.author_id.id == ticket.partner_id.id) else ('is-system' if not message.author_id else 'is-support')}

span.t-esc: 'Customer' if (message.author_id and ticket.partner_id and message.author_id.id == ticket.partner_id.id) else ('System' if not message.author_id else 'Support')

article.p: Recent actions and updates from customer contacts on this ticket.
Control how your contacts receive ticket updates.

t.div: Digest mode is controlled by support team policy: .

article.p: Rate the outcome and add a short note for the service team.

div.label: Low Score Reason

textarea.name: low_score_reason
textarea.placeholder: Please explain why the service did not meet expectations.

div.div: This reason is required for low ratings.

textarea.name: feedback
textarea.placeholder: What went well, and what should the team improve next time?

article.p: Share the latest customer context with impact and urgency so support can prioritize correctly.

form.label: Message

textarea.name: message
textarea.placeholder: Describe latest status, blocker, or question for support.

div.label: Impact
div.div: How much this issue affects your business operations.

div.label: Urgency
div.div: Tell support how quickly this requires attention.

form.label: What changed since last update

textarea.name: change_summary
textarea.placeholder: Example: issue now impacts all branch users, not only finance team.

form.label: Add Collaborator Emails
form.div: Only contacts from your company can be added as ticket collaborators.
form.label: Attachments

div.aria-label: Upload attachments by drag and drop or click

article.p: Confirm this issue is fully resolved before closing the ticket.

div.label: I confirm this issue is resolved.

article.p: Leave context for the support lead without changing the ticket status.

textarea.name: feedback
textarea.placeholder: Share blockers, next steps, or service feedback

textarea.name: reopen_detail
textarea.placeholder: Explain what is still unresolved or what changed.

div.label: I confirm this ticket still needs support.

textarea.name: escalation_reason
textarea.placeholder: Explain urgency, current business impact, and expected response.

div.label: I confirm this issue needs urgent escalation.
